banner.title: About Us
banner.subtitle: Crafting the Future of Automotive Textiles

story.title: From Thread to the Road Ahead
paragraphs: Our legacy spans decades in the automotive textile industry. What began as a small weaving workshop has evolved into a multi-division manufacturing powerhouse serving global automotive OEMs.

At the Nirbhai Group, our companies — Nirbhai Knitting (NK) and NirChem (NC) — represent our dual expertise in advanced knitted fabrics and specialty chemical coatings. Together, they deliver complete material solutions for modern vehicle interiors.
We are driven by precision craftsmanship, continuous innovation, and an unwavering commitment to quality and sustainability that our partners trust.

banner.title: Nirbhai Knitting
banner.subtitle: Advanced Knitted Fabrics for Automotive Interiors
banner.description: Precision-engineered textiles built for performance, comfort, and durability. Our fabrics are trusted by leading automotive manufacturers worldwide.

features.name: Raised
features.description: Premium raised-surface fabrics offering enhanced tactile comfort and visual depth for luxury automotive seating.

features.name: 3D
features.description: Three-dimensional knitted structures providing superior breathability, cushioning, and modern aesthetics.

features.name: FR
features.description: Flame-retardant fabrics engineered to meet stringent automotive safety standards without compromising comfort.

features.name: Coated
features.description: Specialty coated textiles offering water resistance, UV protection, and enhanced durability for demanding applications.

contentBlock.title: Engineering Fabrics for the Future
contentBlock.description: Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility combines traditional craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology to produce fabrics that exceed industry standards.

banner.title: NirChem
banner.subtitle: Specialty Chemical Coatings & Leather Solutions
banner.description: Advanced chemical formulations and coating technologies that transform raw materials into high-performance automotive interior surfaces.

products.name: Synthetic Leather
products.description: High-quality synthetic leather solutions that replicate the look and feel of genuine leather with superior consistency and sustainability.

products.name: Genuine Leather
products.description: Premium genuine leather processing and finishing for luxury automotive applications with exquisite texture and durability.

products.name: Direct Coating
products.description: Advanced direct coating technologies applied to textiles for enhanced performance characteristics and surface protection.

products.name: Others
products.description: Specialized chemical solutions including adhesives, finishes, and treatments tailored to specific automotive interior requirements.

contentBlock.title: Chemistry Meets Craftsmanship
contentBlock.description: Our chemical division leverages decades of formulation expertise to deliver coatings and treatments that enhance the performance and aesthetics of every surface.

banner.title: Sustainability
banner.subtitle: Committed to a Greener Future
banner.description: We believe in manufacturing that respects the planet. Our sustainability initiatives span across materials, processes, and community impact.

intro.title: Our Commitment to the Environment
paragraphs: Sustainability isn't just a goal — it's woven into every thread of our manufacturing process. From sourcing eco-friendly raw materials to reducing waste in our production lines, we are committed to minimizing our environmental footprint.
Our facilities are designed with energy efficiency in mind, and we continuously invest in cleaner technologies and renewable energy sources to power our operations.

pillars.title: Eco-Friendly Materials
pillars.description: We prioritize recycled and sustainably sourced fibers in our textile manufacturing, reducing dependence on virgin materials.

pillars.title: Energy Efficiency
pillars.description: Our manufacturing processes are optimized for minimal energy consumption, with ongoing investments in renewable energy sources.

pillars.title: Waste Reduction
pillars.description: Advanced recycling programs and lean manufacturing techniques help us minimize waste across all production stages.

pillars.title: Community Impact
pillars.description: We actively support local communities through education, employment, and environmental conservation programs.

hero.title: Our Team
hero.subtitle: The People Behind the Precision
hero.description: A dedicated team of industry veterans and innovators driving excellence in every thread and formulation.

leadership.name: Rajeev Kumar
leadership.bio: With over 30 years of industry experience, Rajeev has been the visionary force behind the Nirbhai Group's growth and innovation.

leadership.name: Prathit Kamdar
leadership.bio: Prathit brings strategic leadership and a passion for sustainable manufacturing to drive the company's future direction.
